fields.label: Essay: Describe your academic and career goals
fields.filledValue: As a Senior Software Engineer at StartupXYZ, I am deeply committed to advancing my skills and contributing to innovative technology solutions. This scholarship will support my pursuit of continued education and professional development, enabling me to access new learning opportunities and certifications that will enhance my career. Ultimately, I aim to lead impactful projects that drive positive change in the tech industry and inspire others to follow in my footsteps.

fields.label: Professional Bio (150 words max)
fields.filledValue: I am a Senior Software Engineer with 7 years of experience specializing in full-stack development using JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Python. Currently working at StartupXYZ in San Francisco, I have a strong background in building scalable applications leveraging AWS and PostgreSQL. I hold a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from UC Berkeley and am passionate about delivering clean, efficient, and maintainable code.
